title: kernel-events common definitions (v1)
description: Shared $defs referenced by per-type envelope schemas.

eval_id.description: Session-scoped identifier for a single top-level Maxima evaluation. Kernel-emitted ids match e_<n>; hosts that proxy other producers MAY use different formats.

view_id.description: Session-scoped identifier for a streaming view. Kernel-emitted ids match v_<n>.

iso8601_utc.description: ISO 8601 UTC timestamp with second resolution, e.g. 2026-06-04T15:21:08Z.

mime_bundle.description: Map of MIME type strings to renderable payloads. Conventionally includes text/plain; may include application/x-maxima-latex, image/png, etc. Payloads are MIME-type-specific (text/plain is a string; image/png is base64-encoded string; structured types are JSON objects).

stream_name.description: Standard output stream the line came from.

json_boolean_with_null.description: JSON boolean or null. The kernel emits :false (a Lisp keyword) as the JSON value false; nil as null.
